title: Iran Truce ‘Over,’ Trump Says, as He Threatens More Strikes
summary_full: As both sides accused each other of violating a cease-fire signed three weeks ago, the temporary agreement appeared on the verge of collapse.
summary_public: As both sides accused each other of violating a cease-fire signed three weeks ago, the temporary agreement appeared on the verge of collapse.
